component.name: ChannelItem
component.script:
sub Init() m.background = m.top.findNode("background") m.focusBorder = m.top.findNode("focusBorder") m.poster = m.top.findNode("poster") m.title = m.top.findNode("title") m.liveIndicator = m.top.findNode("liveIndicator") end sub
sub showContent() content = m.top.itemContent if content <> invalid m.title.text = content.title if content.hdPosterUrl <> invalid and content.hdPosterUrl <> "" m.poster.uri = content.hdPosterUrl else if content.posterUrl <> invalid and content.posterUrl <> "" m.poster.uri = content.posterUrl end if
' Show LIVE indicator for live channels if content.contentType <> invalid and content.contentType = "live" m.liveIndicator.visible = true end if end if end sub
sub onFocusPercentChange() focusPercent = m.top.focusPercent if focusPercent > 0.5 m.focusBorder.opacity = 1.0 m.background.color = "0x2E319244" else m.focusBorder.opacity = 0.0 m.background.color = "0x1a1a2eFF" end if end sub
